STATE_CD 
LABEL: 
Submitting State Alpha Abbreviation 
DESCRIPTION: Submitting State (postal abbreviation)

LONG NAME: STATE_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
CCW and CMS/Census Bureau crosswalk (derived) 
FILE(S): 
All header claim, line, and occurrence code files

AK = Alaska
